sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Option Care Health reports Q4 revenue of $1.46-1.47 billion By Investing.com
feed.summary: Option Care Health announced preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2025, projecting Q4 net revenue between $1.46 billion and $1.47 billion, and full year net revenue of $5.645 billion to $5.655 billion. The company also provided 2026 guidance, expecting net revenue between $5.8 billion and $6.0 billion, and expanded its share repurchase program authorization from $500 million to $1.0 billion. Analysts, despite varying price targets, generally view the company favorably, noting its strong market position and aggressive share buybacks.

feed.title: NOV Stock: Why Holding for Now Is the Right Move, Not Buying
feed.summary: NOV Inc. (NOV) has seen its shares outperform the broader oil and energy market, driven by strategic positioning in long-term energy shifts, a record backlog, and strong free cash flow generation. However, challenges include a delayed convergence of growth cycles, a sharp bottom-line contraction, and continued difficulties in the offshore wind market. Given these mixed factors, investors are advised to hold rather than buy, awaiting a more favorable entry point.

feed.title: Rafael Holdings elects directors, approves equity plan amendment at annual meeting
feed.summary: Rafael Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RFL) held its annual meeting where shareholders elected directors, ratified CohnReznick LLP as their accounting firm, and approved an amendment to the company's 2021 Equity Incentive Plan. This amendment increases the shares of Class B common stock available for grant by 1,000,000. Additionally, the company recently issued warrants as part of its merger with Cyclo Therapeutics, which are now listed on NYSE American.

feed.title: PTL Ltd announces $3.88 million registered direct offering of ordinary shares
feed.summary: PTL Ltd has announced a registered direct offering of 155 million Class A ordinary shares at $0.025 per share, aiming to raise approximately $3.88 million. The proceeds will be used for vessel acquisition, working capital, and general corporate purposes. This offering is made to unaffiliated investors under an effective registration statement and has been approved by the company's board of directors.

feed.title: NetApp Adds Independent Director to Strengthen AI Strategy
feed.summary: NetApp expanded its board to ten members by appointing Paul Fipps, President of Global Customer Operations at ServiceNow, as an independent director. This strategic addition aims to strengthen NetApp's execution and innovation in its AI-ready data infrastructure strategy, leveraging Fipps's extensive experience in AI and digital transformation. Analysts currently rate NetApp as a Buy with a $130 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also provides an "Outperform" rating, citing strong financial performance and a strategic focus on high-margin segments.

feed.title: Hormel announces upcoming retirements of Morey and Peil
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation has announced the upcoming retirements of two long-serving leaders: Mark Morey, vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, vice president of marketing for fresh and ready meats. Morey served for over three decades in various roles including sales, marketing, and operations, while Peil contributed 36 years in sales and marketing leadership. Both executives played crucial roles in the growth and transformation of their respective divisions within Hormel.

feed.title: U.S. trial begins over deaths of three Ontario passengers in 2019 Boeing crash
feed.summary: A trial has begun in Chicago regarding the deaths of three Ontario residents who perished in the 2019 Ethiopian Airlines Boeing 737 Max crash. Manant Vaidya is seeking damages from Boeing Co. and Rosemount Aerospace Inc. on behalf of his family members. Boeing has expressed sorrow and accepted legal responsibility for the accidents, having settled most claims while acknowledging families' rights to pursue damages through trials.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. announced its plans to acquire K.F. Cambodia for approximately $510 million to bolster its non-human primate supply chain and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million to enhance biologics testing capabilities. The company also appointed Dr. Namandjé Bumpus as Senior Vice President, Chief Scientific and Innovation Officer, and reported improving demand trends, with shares trading near their 52-week high. These acquisitions and positive outlook are expected to be accretive to non-GAAP earnings per share in 2026 and 2027.

feed.title: Crown Castle terminates DISH Wireless deal after payment default By Investing.com
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. has terminated its wireless infrastructure agreement with DISH Wireless due to DISH defaulting on payment obligations, seeking over $3.5 billion in owed payments. DISH had previously notified partners it was discontinuing its network business after its parent company, EchoStar, planned to sell spectrum licenses. Crown Castle reiterated its commitment to enforcing contractual rights, despite DISH's claims regarding FCC actions, and expects no impact on its 2025 financial results.

feed.title: Revvity expects to exceed Q4 guidance with 6% revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. announced preliminary financial results for Q4 2025, expecting approximately $772 million in revenue, a 6% reported growth year-over-year. The company also projects full-year 2025 revenue to be around $2.855 billion, with adjusted earnings per share anticipated to surpass previous guidance. Revvity plans to release its complete results on February 2, 2026, and will host a conference call, with its CEO Prahlad Singh also presenting at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: Regions CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha named successor By Investing.com
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. (NYSE:RF) announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after 20 years with the bank. Anil Chadha, currently the company’s Controller and head of Corporate Finance, will succeed Turner. Under Turner's leadership, Regions' stock price grew approximately 320 percent, and the company is on track to lead its peer group in return on average tangible common equity for the fifth consecutive year.

feed.title: ServiceNow executive Paul Fipps joins NetApp’s board of directors By Investing.com
feed.summary: NetApp has appointed Paul Fipps, President of Global Customer Operations at ServiceNow, to its Board of Directors, expanding the board to ten members. Fipps brings over 20 years of experience in technology-enabled growth and customer transformation, which NetApp believes will be instrumental in helping customers build intelligent data infrastructure. The appointment comes as NetApp, valued at $21.24 billion and maintaining a "GOOD" financial health rating, continues to strengthen its leadership amid a focus on AI-ready data infrastructure solutions.

feed.title: Invesco reports $2.17 trillion in assets under management for December By Investing.com
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $2,169.9 billion as of December 31, 2025, marking a 0.7% increase from the previous month and a significant 82.36% stock price surge over the past year. The company saw net long-term inflows of $7.7 billion in December and has maintained dividend payments for 19 consecutive years, signaling strong investor confidence and strategic growth. Recent developments include a QQQ fund restructuring, a new partnership with LGT Capital Partners, and a raised price target from BMO Capital, all contributing to Invesco's efforts to modernize offerings and strengthen its market position.

feed.title: Citigroup Has Lowered Expectations for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Stock Price
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) from $267 to $262, while maintaining a "Buy" rating, suggesting a 25.6% upside from the current share price. Several other analysts have also revised their targets downwards, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold" with an average price target of $233.90, compared to the stock's current trading price around $208.60. Honeywell recently reported quarterly EPS of $2.25 and provided FY2025 guidance of $10.60–$10.70 EPS, with institutional ownership remaining high at approximately 75.9%.

feed.title: Barclays Downgrades DexCom (DXCM), Lowers Price Target to $71.00
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded DexCom (DXCM) from Equal-Weight to Underweight, reducing its price target from $80.00 to $71.00. This indicates a bearish outlook from Barclays despite other analysts maintaining or raising price targets for DXCM in recent months. DexCom, which designs continuous glucose monitoring systems, has an average analyst target price of $86.80, suggesting a potential upside of 22.29%.

feed.title: Pete Hegseth gives fiery ‘warrior’ speech to Lockheed Martin workers in Fort Worth
feed.summary: U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth delivered a fiery speech at Lockheed Martin's F-35 plant in Fort Worth, emphasizing increased defense spending and a return to "warrior ethos." He announced a significant budget increase for 2027 and stressed that defense contracts would be awarded based on quick delivery of superior products. Hegseth also declared an end to "woke ideology" distractions, focusing instead on developing a lethal and disciplined military.

feed.title: SkimTurf Management to connect with the John Deere Operations Center
feed.summary: SkimTurf Management has integrated with the John Deere Operations Center, enabling golf course superintendents to use SkimTurf data for precise spraying with John Deere equipment. This connection helps optimize resource allocation, enhance turf maintenance efficiency, and promote sustainability by minimizing unnecessary applications. The new "Prescriptions" module in the SkimTurf app allows users to define targeted spray zones based on specific measurement ranges.

feed.title: Option Care Health Inc - Q4 2025 Net Revenue Expected At $1.46 Billion-$1.47 Billion - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Option Care Health Inc. (OPCH) has announced its expected net revenue for Q4 2025 to be between $1.46 billion and $1.47 billion, according to an SEC filing. This information was released via Reuters news and is based on the company's latest financial disclosures. The article primarily highlights this revenue projection without further detailed text.

feed.title: Western Digital sets date to share latest quarterly financials
feed.summary: Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) announced it will release its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on Thursday, January 29, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern on the same day to discuss these results. A live audio webcast and replay will be available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: LAKELAND ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is Investigating Lakeland Industries, Inc. on Behalf of Lakeland Stockholders and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. is investigating potential claims against Lakeland Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: LAKE) on behalf of its stockholders. This investigation follows a significant drop in Lakeland's stock price after the company reported a 95% decrease in adjusted EBITDA and a net loss of $16 million for Q3 2026, largely attributed to certification delays. The firm encourages affected investors to contact them to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: Regions Financial CFO David Turner to retire, Anil Chadha to succeed
feed.summary: Regions Financial announced that CFO David Turner will retire on March 31 after nearly 40 years in finance, including two decades at the bank. He will be succeeded by Regions Bank veteran Anil Chadha, who currently serves as Controller and head of Corporate Finance and is part of Turner’s leadership team. Chadha has been responsible for financial reporting, accounting policy, and all financial planning activities.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Schedules Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR) will announce its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, February 12, 2026. The company will also host a live earnings conference call on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 8 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Details for accessing the call and webcast are provided for investors.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) Shares Gap Down - Here's Why
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) shares gapped down on Monday, opening at $64.67 after closing at $66.84, with trading volumes around 432,600 shares. Despite the dip, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $84.44. FIS recently beat quarterly earnings expectations and provided strong FY2025 EPS guidance, alongside a $0.40 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Option Care Health, a home infusion leader, expects up to $6B next year
feed.summary: Option Care Health reported preliminary unaudited results for Q4 and full year 2025, and provided preliminary financial guidance for full year 2026, with net revenue projected between $5.8 billion and $6.0 billion. The company's board also expanded its share repurchase authorization to $1.0 billion, following $307 million in repurchases during 2025. Despite positive revenue and EBITDA expectations, cash flow from operations for 2025 is expected to be below $320 million.

feed.title: How to listen in as ADM breaks down its latest quarterly results
feed.summary: ADM (NYSE: ADM) announced it will host an audio webcast on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time, to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and provide a company update. Prior to the call, a press release and presentation will be made available on ADM's Investor Relations website. A replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the company's website.

feed.title: Regions Financial (RF) plans CFO transition as David Turner retires, appoints Anil Chadha
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corporation announced that CFO David J. Turner, Jr. will retire on March 31, 2026. He will be succeeded by Anil D. Chadha, effective upon Turner's retirement. Chadha, currently Controller and head of Corporate Finance, has been with Regions since 2011, ensuring continuity in the finance leadership.

feed.title: Regions Financial Announces David Turner to Retire, Anil Chadha to Serve as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corp. announced that Chief Financial Officer David Turner will retire on March 31, 2026, after 20 years with the bank and a nearly 40-year career in finance. Anil Chadha, currently the Controller and head of Corporate Finance at Regions, will succeed Turner as CFO. Turner is credited with leading the company through challenging times, contributing to strong financial performance, and maintaining a robust balance sheet.

feed.title: The Truth About Otis Worldwide Corp.: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Actually a Secret Power Play?
feed.summary: The article explores whether Otis Worldwide Corp. (OTIS), an old-school elevator and escalator company, is a secretly powerful investment despite its "boring" appearance. It suggests that Otis's business model, heavily reliant on recurring maintenance revenue and embedded in global urbanization trends, offers stability and predictable cash flow, making it a "Steady Eddie" stock for long-term investors seeking lower drama and consistent returns, rather than quick, viral gains. The piece contrasts Otis with meme stocks and high-beta tech, positioning it as a foundational hold for a balanced portfolio.

feed.title: Former FDA leader joins Charles River to expand faster, animal-free drug tests
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories announced two acquisitions and the appointment of Dr. Namandjé N. Bumpus, former FDA Principal Deputy Commissioner, as Chief Scientific and Innovation Officer. The company plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. to secure its non-human primate supply chain and PathoQuest SAS to enhance in vitro, animal-free testing methods using next-generation sequencing. These strategic moves aim to strengthen the company's drug development solutions, promote efficiency, and reduce reliance on animal testing, while also providing a preliminary optimistic outlook for 2026 due to improving demand trends.

feed.title: How Thermo Fisher and NVIDIA want to turn routine labs into AI powerhouses
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE: TMO) announced a strategic collaboration with NVIDIA to integrate AI into its laboratory solutions, aiming to enhance automation, accuracy, and speed in scientific research. The partnership will leverage NVIDIA's AI platform, including DGX Spark, NeMo, and BioNeMo, to empower scientific instruments and data, enabling scientists to automate tasks and accelerate discoveries. This initiative aims to transform scientific workflows, making laboratory processes more efficient and enabling "lab-in-the-loop" science for industrial-scale discovery.

feed.title: Former PwC global board chair Lisa P. Sawicki joins Moody’s board
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation has elected Lisa P. Sawicki, former Chair of the Global Board at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP (PwC), to its Board of Directors, effective March 16, 2026. Ms. Sawicki brings over 35 years of experience in audit and business advisory services for financial institutions, and she will join the Board’s Audit and Governance & Nominating committees. Moody’s Chairman Vincent Forlenza highlighted her extensive experience in financial services, audit, regulation, and international leadership as valuable assets for the company.

feed.title: Nathan's Famous hot dog restaurant opens on North Fourth Avenue
feed.summary: Nathan's Famous, renowned for its annual Fourth of July hot dog eating contest, has opened a new location on North Fourth Avenue in Tucson, Arizona. This marks the only operating Nathan's in the state and is situated where The Blind Tiger and Casbah Tea House once stood. The restaurant offers hot dogs, burgers, chicken sandwiches, and other items, with hours extending late on weekends.

feed.title: Citigroup to cut ~1,000 jobs this week - report (C:NYSE)
feed.summary: Citigroup plans to eliminate approximately 1,000 jobs this week as part of CEO Jane Fraser's ongoing efforts to streamline the bank and enhance returns. These reductions are a component of the company's broader strategy to cut a total of 20,000 positions.

feed.title: JPM26: Bristol Myers CEO to ‘cast a broad net’ as business development remains a top priority
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb CEO Chris Boerner stated that business development remains a top priority for the company, aiming to launch over 10 new medicines by 2030. BMS has been active in mergers and acquisitions, completing $30 billion in deals over the last two years, and plans to continue this strategy by "casting a broad net" to improve its growth profile. The company is focusing on core therapeutic areas like neuroscience, cardiovascular, immunology, and oncology, highlighting six assets with multi-billion-dollar potential.

feed.title: OS Therapies Enters into Warrant Inducement Agreements
feed.summary: OS Therapies announced it raised $7.53 million in gross proceeds from pre-existing investors through warrant exercise inducement and exchange offers. This capital provides runway into 2027 and will fund regulatory approval submissions for OST-HER2, commercial preparation activities, and preparations for an OS Animal Health spinoff. The company aims for regulatory approval of OST-HER2 in the US, UK, and EU in 2026 and plans to file a Biologics Licensing Application with the U.S. FDA by January 2026.

feed.title: PENN Entertainment Restructures To Boost Omnichannel Tourism Experience
feed.summary: PENN Entertainment has announced a significant corporate restructuring aimed at enhancing operational efficiency, customer engagement, and its omnichannel tourism offerings. This strategic shift includes a greater focus on digital assets, technology integration, and leadership changes to provide a seamless experience across retail and digital platforms. The moves are intended to maximize free cash flow, strengthen customer loyalty through its PENN Play program, and solidify its position in the global tourism sector.

feed.title: lululemon athletica inc Updates Q4 2025 Revenue and Earnings Expectations
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (LULU) announced updated expectations for Q4 2025, projecting revenue and diluted EPS to be at the high end of its previous guidance. The company anticipates revenue between $3.500B and $3.585B and EPS between $4.66 and $4.76, driven by strong holiday performance. Management will meet investors at the ICR Conference.

feed.title: Barclays Has Lowered Expectations for Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) Stock Price
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) from $584 to $579, maintaining an "equal weight" rating. Despite this, the consensus analyst rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $600.75. Teledyne recently surpassed Q3 earnings estimates and provided optimistic FY2025 EPS guidance, indicating continued growth.

feed.title: Investors have shrugged off threats to the economy. With fourth-quarter earnings due, will company CEOs?
feed.summary: As fourth-quarter earnings season begins with JPMorgan and Delta, investors are optimistic, but it remains to be seen if corporate America shares this enthusiasm given economic concerns. The article highlights high expectations for S&P 500 companies despite worries about the job market and the Federal Reserve's independence. It questions whether CEOs will echo the market's bullishness.

feed.title: CE Mark Granted to Penumbra’s MIDWAY and ACCESS25 Delivery Catheters
feed.summary: Penumbra Inc. has received CE Mark approval for its MIDWAY and ACCESS25 delivery catheters, enhancing its neuro access platform. These catheters are designed to provide excellent trackability and platform stability for delivering various embolization therapies in the neurovasculature, including microcatheters, embolization coils, and flow diverters. The ACCESS25 specifically supports the delivery of Penumbra's 0.020-inch coil platform for neurovascular embolization, expanding treatment options for challenging medical conditions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Lowers Informa (LON:INF) Price Target to GBX 1,330
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Informa (LON:INF) from GBX 1,345 to GBX 1,330, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of nearly 50% from the stock's previous close of GBX 886.80. Other analysts also show mostly positive ratings for Informa, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of GBX 1,105, despite the stock experiencing a 1.6% decline on the day of the report.

feed.title: Charleston Climate Coalition to protest Dominion Energy's proposed gas plant
feed.summary: Environmental advocates from the Charleston Climate Coalition and partner organizations will protest Dominion Energy's proposed natural gas plant and pipeline, which they argue would harm consumers, accelerate climate change, and threaten the ecologically sensitive ACE Basin. The rally aims to urge the South Carolina Public Service Commission to reject the project, as critics believe renewable alternatives have not been fully explored. Dominion Energy asserts the plant is necessary to meet growing energy demands.

feed.title: Crown Castle terminates DISH Wireless deal after payment default By Investing.com
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. has terminated its wireless infrastructure agreement with DISH Wireless due to DISH defaulting on payment obligations, with Crown Castle seeking over $3.5 billion in owed payments. DISH halted payments after announcing plans to sell spectrum licenses, claiming FCC actions negated its contractual duties, a claim Crown Castle disputes. Despite this, Crown Castle anticipates no impact on its full-year 2025 financial results and has recently reported strong Q3 2025 results and received positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: NETSTREIT completes record $657.1 million investment activity in 2025 By Investing.com
feed.summary: NETSTREIT Corp. (NYSE:NTST) achieved a record $657.1 million in gross investment activity in 2025 with a 7.5% blended cash yield, maintaining strong revenue growth and reaffirming its 2025 AFFO per share guidance while introducing 2026 guidance. The company also secured an investment-grade rating and boasts over $1 billion in liquidity, despite a recent Q3 2025 EPS and revenue miss. Analysts' price targets suggest potential upside, even as InvestingPro indicates a slight overvaluation.

feed.title: Pool Corporation announces leadership changes as St. Romain to retire By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pool Corporation announced that Senior Vice President Kenneth "Kenny" G. St. Romain will retire in 2026 after over 40 years with the company. John B. Watwood has been appointed Executive Vice President to oversee North American swimming pool operations and lead digital and technology initiatives. The company, a major wholesale distributor of pool products, is valued at $9.65 billion and has consistently raised its dividend.

feed.title: Big apartment landlord schedules new look at how its rentals are doing
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) has announced its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings release will be on Thursday, February 5, 2026, after market close. Management will host a conference call the next day, February 6, 2026, at 10:00 AM Central Time. Interested parties are encouraged to join via webcast to access associated visuals, with the dial-in line reserved for accredited analysts and investors for Q&A.

feed.title: Assurant to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call and live audio webcast to discuss the results on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. Key executives, including President and CEO Keith Demmings, will review the financial performance during the call.

feed.title: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Monday, February 2, 2026; Provides Update on Financial Performance
feed.summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Monday, February 2, 2026, and will host a conference call the same day at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. The company provided preliminary financial results, expecting fourth quarter revenue of approximately $772 million and full year 2025 revenue of around $2,855 million, with adjusted earnings per share projected to exceed previous guidance. Additionally, CEO Prahlad Singh is scheduled to present at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13, 2026.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Announces the Retirement of Kenneth G. St. Romain and the Appointment of John B. Watwood
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq/GSM: POOL) announced the retirement of Kenneth G. St. Romain, Senior Vice President, in 2026. Concurrently, John B. Watwood has been appointed as Executive Vice President, overseeing North American swimming pool operations and digital initiatives. Mr. St. Romain, with over 40 years of service, will assist with the transition.

feed.title: What a global finance CEO will face in a live 2026 investor Q&A
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (Nasdaq: PFG) announced that its CEO, Deanna Strable, will participate in a fireside chat at the Bank of America Financial Services Conference on February 11, 2026. She will discuss industry and company-specific topics in a Q&A format. The event will be available via audio webcast on Principal's investor website.
